creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
lawrance    2006-11-01 10:59:09 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/autoconf-archive Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    devel/autoconf-archive/files patch-Makefile.in 
  Log:
  Add autoconf-archive, a set of useful GNU Autoconf macros.
  
  This port is somewhat distinct from ac-archive, see the PR for background.
  
  PR:             ports/103935
  Submitted by:   Martin Kammerhofer
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2491    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +44 -0     ports/devel/autoconf-archive/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/autoconf-archive/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/devel/autoconf-archive/files/patch-Makefile.in (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/devel/autoconf-archive/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +882 -0    ports/devel/autoconf-archive/pkg-plist (new)
